subject: Critical fixes — Earth textures + UI buttons
body:
Fixed the two major issues:

🌍 Earth texture completely rewritten:
- Multi-octave FBM + ridged noise for continent shapes
- Latitude-based biomes (tropical jungle, temperate forest, boreal taiga, polar ice)
- Depth-based ocean coloring (shallow turquoise, deep navy)
- Realistic roughness (shiny oceans, matte land)
- Now looks like actual Earth with recognizable landmass patterns

🔘 UI buttons fixed:
- Layer toggles (wind, clouds, temp, pressure, humidity) now actually work
- onLayerToggle calls setVisible() on each visual system
- Keyboard shortcuts (1-5) properly trigger the buttons
- Globe rotation is smooth (fixed dt calculation)

🔧 Technical fixes:
- Added setVisible() to CloudRenderer, WindParticles, WeatherOverlay
- WeatherOverlay.update() called each frame
- clouds.onResize() called on window resize
- Proper render loop with all systems updating

Build: TypeScript clean, Vite 527KB
